form_name: CMS Facility Compliance and Audit Report

api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the name field.

api_mappings.description: Unique certification number for the facility.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the certification_number field from the licenses object.
Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the street field from the address object.

api_mappings.description: Combined city, state, and zip code of the facility address.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract city, state, and zip from the address object, combining them in the format: {city}, {state}, {zip}.

api_mappings.description: National Provider Identifier for the facility.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the npi field.

api_mappings.description: Email address of the facility's administrator.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the email field from the contact object.

api_mappings.description: Contact telephone number of the facility.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the phone field from the contact object.
Find the audit record for the matching facility and extract the audit_date field, converting it into MM/DD/YYYY format if necessary.

api_mappings.description: Name of the auditor conducting the compliance assessment.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the auditor associated with the matching facility and extract the full_name field.

api_mappings.description: Total number of beds in the facility.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the facility matching the user-provided facility name and ID, then extract the total_beds field from the capacity object.
Find the audit record for the matching facility and extract the compliance_status field. Mark it as checked for 'Compliant' status.

api_mappings.description: General comments provided during the audit.
api_mappings.data_location: Find the audit record for the matching facility and extract the comments field if available.

database_mappings.description: Administrator or Medical Director authorized to sign forms.
database_mappings.requirements: Employee whose can_sign_3427 is set to 1 and matches the provided facility ID.

database_mappings.description: Date of form signature, dynamically added at the time of form completion.
